name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: State of the Revolution
body:
the political revolution isn't going to happen in Washington -- it's happening every day in your communities.
#
Friends,
Last night's State of the Revolution livestream brought together thousands of progressive activists and community leaders across America. Our focus on local groups highlighted the massive success of our organizing chapters and exemplified the influence that the grassroots can wield over the electoral process. Our Revolution's endorsement model empowers local groups to lift up grassroots candidates because we know that the political revolution isn't going to happen in Washington -- it's happening every day in your communities.
Local groups are the lifeblood of our movement, and now is the time that we must be building them. As I said last night, "We are in the 440 relay race of our lives." What Bernie started last year is still continuing strong in the thousands of Our Revolution members organizing locally.
[**Can you make a $5 contribution to help us advance the lead for the progressive movement?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3a/43f17890/dae252d8/6203b797/3868090450/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-livestream?refcode=em170424-full")
[](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3a/43f17890/dae252d8/6203b797/3868090450/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-livestream?refcode=em170424-full")
Our Revolution members gathered in homes, diners, conference centers and more to watch the State of the Revolution.
In just a few short months, Our Revolution has had over 1,000 groups apply to join the national organization with hundreds approved and in the onboarding process, and recruited over 12,000 candidates for local office. Candidates like Mike Connolly and khalid kamau ran and won their elections against incredible odds to advance single-payer health care and a $15 minimum wage, proving that with the support of local groups real change is possible.
Our candidates, local leaders, and our dedicated staff and volunteers are the evidence that we don't need to wait for the establishment to make a difference in our community. We understand that people who themselves have never been involved in the political process can not only help transform the party, but bring their entire community with them to reinvigorate it.
[**That is what Our Revolution is here to do. We have the power to organize and win, but it's going to take all of us together to accomplish the change we need. Can you contribute $5 to help lead this transformative movement?**](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3a/43f17890/dae252d8/6203b797/3868090450/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-livestream?refcode=em170424-full")
The time is now to make a difference. Together, we have the power to create a country that works for all of us, not just the few.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
Board Member
Our Revolution
**[DONATE»](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/24fb0d3a/43f17890/dae252d8/6203b797/3868090450/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/or-livestream?refcode=em170424-full")**

name: The White House
subject: Your 1600 Daily
body:
Everything White House for 4/25/2017. |

**FEATURED**
In his first 100 days, President Donald J. Trump has taken bold action to restore prosperity, keep Americans safe and secure, and hold government accountable. At an historic pace, this President has enacted more legislation and signed more executive orders than any other president in over a half century. With a focus on rebuilding the military, ending illegal immigration, and restoring confidence in our economy, the President is keeping his promises to the American people.

* **11:35AM:** President Trump participates in the United States Holocaust Memorial Museum’s National Days of Remembrance

**AFTERNOON:**
* **1:45PM:** President Trump meets with Secretary of the Treasury Steven Mnuchin

* **3:00PM:** President Trump participates in a farmers’ roundtable and signing of the Executive Order Promoting Agriculture and Rural Prosperity in America

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: A New Direction for ObamaCare repeal
body:
I wrote an [op-ed for today's Wall Street Journal](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=307&l=203&ctl=A09:C15079EF2606CA7C82D51038F333F950D2A4146F44E9B90D&) on how we can move forward to repeal ObamaCare. You can read the full text [here on the Wall Street Journal website](http://wc4.net/t?r=4673&c=307&l=203&ctl=A0A:C15079EF2606CA7C82D51038F333F950D2A4146F44E9B90D&).

In the op-ed, I argue _“the real goal must be something larger, more inspiring and more important than merely getting to a signing ceremony._

_The GOP has now tried and failed to replace ObamaCare with its own, less expensive entitlement program. Rather than simply tweaking the previous failure, why not take a completely different approach?”_

I urge Congress to start the path toward repeal by knowing where they're going — starting not with modifications to the existing failed law or concerns over Senate rules, but by defining what they want to accomplish.

I argue that should prioritize lowering costs. ObamaCare prioritized increasing coverage, and it resulted in higher costs and lower quality. We've seen dramatic premium increases, and implementing ObamaCare has driven the country further into debt.

As I urged Congress in the WSJ op-ed:_“Focusing on lowering costs is the way to increase coverage in a meaningful and sustainable way.”_

Sincerely,

Bobby Jindal

* * *

[Unsubscribe](http://wc4.net/u?id=C15079EF2606CA7C82D51038F333F950D2A4146F44E9B90D)

body:
Add your name to the earliest records of our historic presidency. |

100-DAY DONOR MEMBERSHIP Email: dpwillis67@gmail.com Deadline: 04/29/17 Status INACTIVE ACCEPT YOUR MEMBERSHIP Friend, We’re sending the first list of 100-Day Donors to the President tonight at 11:59 PM. This is your chance to etch your name into the records of the first 100 days of our presidency. Contribute just $1 to add your name to tonight’s list of the first round of 100-Day Members. Thanks, Trump Headquarters ---------- Forwarded message ---------- From: Donald J. Trump Date: April 23, 2017 at 2:36 PM Subject: In just 6 days... To: dpwillis67@gmail.com
Friend, The 100 day-mark of our presidency is coming up on April 29th. And I hope to see your name on my final list of First 100-Day Members. This is your last chance to have your name etched in the earliest records of our historic presidency. Please make a contribution of just $1 before April 29th to land your spot on my list of 100-Day Members. The dishonest media doesn’t like to talk about what we’ve accomplished, so I’m going to give you a few highlights of what we’ve done... ✔ We ordered the construction of a strong, impenetrable wall along the Southern border. ✔ We nominated Justice Gorsuch to the Supreme Court who has already begun hearing a case on religious liberties. So important! ✔ We signed the “Hire American, Buy American Act” to help America workers and manufacturers who have been left in the dark. ✔ We approved the Keystone and Dakota Access Pipelines that will provide tens of thousands of new jobs and help end our dependence on Middle East oil. ✔ We stopped using your tax dollars to fund abortions around the world. ✔ We rolled back Obama’s restrictions on your constitutional right to protect yourself and your family through the Second Amendment. ✔ We ordered restrictions on immigration from countries compromised by radical Islamic terrorism -- even despite obstruction from the far left. ✔ We ended terrible regulations that sent American factories overseas and hurt small businesses. Friend, these are just a few of the things we’ve done and we are only getting started... No matter what the media does to try and stop us, I will keep fighting day and night until we can say that we’ve truly made America great again. But I can’t do it alone. I’ll need your help, Friend. body:
Celebrating with close friends and family. |

Friend, It has been a memorable year, and we’re just getting started. I’ve been so lucky to have the best woman by my side throughout the campaign, and now as our country’s greatest First Lady. As you may know, on April 26, we will be celebrating Melania’s birthday and I want you to be a part of our celebration. We always include family and close friends, and you have been one of our most loyal supporters in the fight to Make America Great Again! I want all of our great supporters to please sign Melania’s official card and include a personal message wishing her a very happy birthday. You have meant so much to our success, and I know the First Lady will be thrilled to hear from you on this special day. I want to be able to show her the millions of supporters she has all across the country, so I will be sharing this card with her on her special day. Join us in making this a birthday our First Lady will never forget. Sign the official card before Melania’s birthday on April 26. Best, Donald J. Trump President of the United States P.S. Please join me in celebrating the birthday of our incredible First Lady, a true champion of women, and my beautiful wife, Melania, by signing her card now.

name: Andrew Gillum
subject: My commitment to you
body:
Let's bring it home.
#
Team --
If you've seen our campaign announcement video, you already know the story - growing up, my grandmother would tell me to go to school, to mind my teachers, to get that education and bring it home - for my brothers and my sister, for our neighborhood, and our community. And this idea of bringing it home for Florida has become an integral part of our campaign.
I'm reaching out today to talk with you a little more about this, because I want you to know that when we talk about "home" on this campaign, we aren't talking about a specific place, but rather a feeling -- the confidence that you can come as you are, be welcomed, and be cared about. That's what we want to create in this movement and this state, and that's why we're going everywhere and speaking to everyone on this campaign.
[**Will you help us bring it home for Florida by making a contribution of $20 or whatever you can afford before our end of month fundraising deadline?**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3398/9e00690/49d0cedb/24034228/2132484283/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170425-home")
We're working to give every Floridian the opportunity they need to succeed and live a fulfilled life, to have a "home" here - no matter your race, religion, sexual orientation, gender identity, class, age, ability, or education level, no matter if you were born here or any country in the world - we can be that kind of state, and I will be that kind of Governor.
Together, we are building the kind of campaign that the entire state can be proud of, that stands up for every Floridian, that gives opportunity to every family no matter what their background is. And together, we're going to win back the Governor's office after more than 20 long years.
This is our opportunity to bring it home for Florida -- [**I hope you 'll help us make that happen.**](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3398/9e00690/49d0cedb/24034228/2132484283/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170425-home")
Bring it home,
Andrew
**[CONTRIBUTE](http://act.andrewgillum.com/page/m/fcb3398/9e00690/49d0cedb/24034228/2132484283/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ag-april2017?refcode=em20170425-home")**

Paid by Andrew Gillum, Democrat, for Governor

name: Keith Ellison
subject: You should be a Founding Donor
body:
Help us keep fighting
---
**Donald Trump will mark 100 days in office this week -- and we'll celebrate 100 days of resistance. Help us keep fighting by becoming a Founding Donor to our 100 Day Resistance Fund:
**[DONATE](http://my.democrats.org/page/m/4052c87f/4067b0a/2f54c1b9f/7e75c614/1958232624/VEsH/ "https://my.democrats.org/100-Day-Resistance-Fund-AB?utm_medium=email&utm_source=dnc&utm_content=1+-+DONATE&utm_campaign=em_20170425_ke_nd&source=em_20170425_ke_nd&refcode=em_20170425_ke_nd")****
This Saturday marks Trump's 100th day in office. You know how he plans on "celebrating" it? A big campaign rally.

I suspect he's going to be shouting about how "bigly" he's won during his first hundred days. He'll brag about how he rushed a series of disastrously unqualified Cabinet nominees through the confirmation process, and he'll falsely claim to have saved jobs through the environmental protections he's undone. He'll declare victory and say he's kept his promises to the American people.

That's what this administration likes to call the "alternative facts" version of what happened in Trump's first 100 days. But we know the truth.

As Donald broke promise after promise, on everything from health care to jobs to national security, Democrats fought back. Millions of Americans joined the Women's March the day after Trump's inauguration, and the resistance is still growing.

Together, we stood up to an unjust and unconstitutional Muslim ban. We put pressure on GOP senators to reject Andy Puzder, who would have turned the Department of Labor against the working people it was created to protect. We stopped Trump and the GOP from replacing Obamacare with a deadly alternative that would have cost millions of Americans the coverage they rely on.

No matter what Donald claims, the real story of these first hundred days will be one of resistance -- your resistance.

As Democrats, we're committed to standing shoulder to shoulder with all the Americans who are resisting Donald Trump. Ultimately, our mission is to ensure that our resistance ends in replacing Trump's allies with legislators and governors who share our values and will fight for us.

That's why we launched our 100 Day Resistance Fund this week. As Trump marks 100 days in office, we'll show 100 days of persistence and resilience -- and commit to winning elections.

Help us win. Chip in $3 or more to become a Founding Donor today.

name: Jay Inslee
subject: This is disappointing
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Inslee for Washington
body:
Our children and teachers are depending on us.

| [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=MTA4OTA4NTgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjAwMzY3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Friend, It is very disappointing to be in this position once again. Again this year, Washington Republicans are refusing to negotiate for a budget that funds our schools in a way that ensures all our children get the 21st-century education they not only need but we are required by law to provide. As a result we have been unable to reach agreement on our overall budget and once again, I was forced to call for a special session to get the job done. You know as well as I do that we must provide Washington's kids the resources they need to get the 21st-century education they deserve. We must not only clear the bar set by the State Supreme Court in the McCleary decision, but ensure we are doing the very best to help our students prepare for the future. But Republicans are refusing to negotiate on the full budget. This is their job, and they need to get it done. We are already seeing news reports that school districts are feeling the effect of this delay. **Republicans ' stalling is having a real effect on our classes. We have to do something about it now.** [**Will you stand with me and tell Republicans to do their jobs and commit to fully funding our education system?**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA4OTA4NTgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjAwMzY3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) The truth is that Republicans just aren't interested in moving this process forward on time. In fact, Senator Rossi said recently that budget negotiations were **just like fishing** \-- that we just had to be patient. But budget negotiations aren't recreation. Stalling shouldn't be a political tactic. Real Washingtonians are waiting to know how their lives will be changed by these negotiations. Our students, teachers, families, and communities deserve better. They deserve negotiations that put their best interests on top. They deserve for legislators to do their jobs. Every day special session continues is costing taxpayers money and it is another day they failed to get their job done. Washingtonians deserve better. That's why I'm asking you to make your voice heard and tell them they need to do just that. [**Please, tell Republican state senators today: Do your jobs and commit to funding our schools once and for all!**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=MTA4OTA4NTgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjAwMzY3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0) Thank you for joining me today. Very truly yours, Jay Inslee | [SIGN ON »](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=4&ms=MTA4OTA4NTgS1&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTE0MjAwMzY3NwS2&mt=1&rt=0)

name: Wayne MacDonald
subject: There's a lot happening on May 18th...
body:
Hi Derek,

We are less than a month away from our first dinner of the year
on May 18th in Nashua. I am excited to meet and hear from our
special guest, Kellyanne Conway!

In addition to our special guest, I am pleased to announce we
will also be awarding Republican activists and leaders from
across the state with our annual Norris Cotton awards. A
Republican from each county and major city committee will be
honored for their dedication and hard work in 2016.

Congratulations to our winners!

Belknap County GOP

Nancy LeRoy

Carroll County GOP

Lino Avellini

Cheshire County GOP

Kate Day

Coos County GOP

Timothy Phillips

Grafton County GOP

Bruce Perlo

Hillsborough County GOP
Toni Greene

Merrimack County GOP
Rep. Natalie Wells

Rockingham County GOP
Joe Barton

Strafford County GOP
Matt Mayberry

Sullivan County GOP

Betty Maiola

Concord City GOP

Kerry Marsh

Derry City GOP
Phil Abirached

Manchester City GOP
Jacob Brahm

clean_body: Hi Derek, We are less than a month away from our first dinner of the year on May 18th in Nashua. I am excited to meet and hear from our special guest, Kellyanne Conway! In addition to our special guest, I am pleased to announce we will also be awarding Republican activists and leaders from across the state with our annual Norris Cotton awards. A Republican from each county and major city committee will be honored for their dedication and hard work in 2016. Congratulations to our winners! Belknap County GOP Nancy LeRoy Carroll County GOP Lino Avellini Cheshire County GOP Kate Day Coos County GOP Timothy Phillips Grafton County GOP Bruce Perlo Hillsborough County GOP Toni Greene Merrimack County GOP Rep. Natalie Wells Rockingham County GOP Joe Barton Strafford County GOP Matt Mayberry Sullivan County GOP Betty Maiola Concord City GOP Kerry Marsh Derry City GOP Phil Abirached Manchester City GOP Jacob Brahm Nashua City GOP Rep. Donald LeBrun Join us in honoring these great Republicans, supporting the Party, and hearing from the first woman to run a successful presidential campaign!
